name: finboard
description: Finboard — KYC, banking, and investment platform

scripts.docs: echo 'API docs: http://localhost:4000/docs (start gateway with pnpm dev)'
scripts.dev:microservices: concurrently -n gateway,auth,profile,kyc,doc,bank,invest,notify,audit,web -c blue,magenta,cyan,yellow,red,green,gray,redBright,cyan,white "pnpm --filter @finboard/api-gateway dev" "pnpm --filter @finboard/auth-service dev" "pnpm --filter @finboard/profile-service dev" "pnpm --filter @finboard/kyc-service dev" "pnpm --filter @finboard/ocr-service dev" "pnpm --filter @finboard/banking-service dev" "pnpm --filter @finboard/investment-service dev" "pnpm --filter @finboard/notification-service dev" "pnpm --filter @finboard/audit-service dev" "pnpm --filter @finboard/customer-web dev"
scripts.test:services: pnpm --filter @finboard/auth-service test && pnpm --filter @finboard/profile-service test && pnpm --filter @finboard/ocr-service test && pnpm --filter @finboard/banking-service test && pnpm --filter @finboard/investment-service test && pnpm --filter @finboard/notification-service test && pnpm --filter @finboard/audit-service test && pnpm --filter @finboard/api-gateway test
